subcodes.first_line: The throne hath indeed been established, and the Ancient Beauty hath ascended thereupon. He hath proclaimed with the loftiest voice amongst the nations that verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استقر العرش و استوی علیه جمال القدم و نطق باعلی الندآء بین الامم علی انه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
